backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the debt collection backend with case, activity, document, and user profile management, including role-based access control via authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the 'Add Comment' button functionality in CommentHistorySection to its implementation file and associated components/tests.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing the purpose and key details of each component, page, hook, and style file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point applying Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Kollect Lite React app, mounting the app at the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for TaskQueue and CaseDetail, gating access behind Internet Identity authentication.
Form component for logging collection activities with Action/Outcome dropdowns, conditional PTP amount/date fields, a comments textarea, and backend submission via React Query mutation.
frontend/src/components/ActivityTimeline: Read-only timeline component that fetches and displays case activities from the backend in reverse chronological order, showing badges, PTP details, and comments.
frontend/src/components/CaseCard.tsx: Clickable card component displaying a debt collection case summary including debtor name, customer ID with copy button, phone number, DPD badge, and status badge.
frontend/src/components/CommentHistorySe: Displays a list of comments for a given case with PTP status color coding, and provides a form to add new comments with status selection and simulated async submission.
frontend/src/components/CopyButton.tsx: A small button component that copies provided text to the clipboard and briefly shows a checkmark confirmation icon.
frontend/src/components/DocumentsSection: Renders a list of dummy documents for a case with file-type icons and a preview button, plus Upload and Scan action buttons.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header displaying the Kollect Lite logo and title, with a logout button that clears the Internet Identity session and React Query cache.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component wrapping pages with the Header, a main content outlet, and a footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Full-screen login page showing the Kollect Lite branding and a button to trigger Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/PhoneMockup.tsx: Renders children inside a styled iPhone frame mockup with a notch, status bar, and scrollable screen area.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Displays a colored badge for a case's CaseStatus, mapping backend statuses (escalated, active, ptp) to UI labels like ACTIVE and Closed.
frontend/src/data/dummyComments.ts: Defines the Comment and PtpStatus types and exports a hardcoded array of dummy comments associated with multiple case IDs for UI development.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating cases, activities, and documents via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme colors used throughout the app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CaseDetail.tsx: Page component that displays detailed information for a single debt collection case, including debtor info, status, activities, and documents, using hardcoded dummy data.
frontend/src/pages/TaskQueue.tsx: Page component that renders a searchable, filterable list of debt collection cases using hardcoded dummy data and CaseCard components.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, shadows, accordion animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the 'Kollect Lite' project, recording existing features (functional Add Comment button in CommentHistorySection) and a pending new feature request to make the comment button interactive.
